{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Alagaeus's Vessel
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus's Vessel]] magnifies his anger into the wrath of the earth.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
